compliment.example: She paid me a kind compliment.
compliment.example_zh: 她對我說了句好聽的讚美。

compliment.example: He complimented her on her work.

comply.example: All drivers must comply with the law.
comply.example_zh: 所有駕駛都必須遵守法律。

component.example: Each component of the machine is important.
component.example_zh: 機器的每個零件都很重要。

compound.example: Water is a compound of hydrogen and oxygen.

comprehend.example: It is hard to comprehend such a huge number.
comprehend.example_zh: 這麼大的數字很難理解。

comprehension.example: The test checks your reading comprehension.
comprehension.example_zh: 這個測驗檢查你的閱讀理解能力。

comprise.example_zh: 這支隊伍由十名成員組成。

compromise.example: Both sides reached a fair compromise.
compromise.example_zh: 雙方達成了公平的妥協。

compulsory.example: English is a compulsory subject at school.
compulsory.example_zh: 英文是學校的必修科目。

conceal.example: He tried to conceal his disappointment.

concede.example: She conceded that she had made an error.

conceive.example: It is hard to conceive of life without phones.
conceive.example_zh: 很難想像沒有手機的生活。

conception.example: He has a clear conception of his goals.
conception.example_zh: 他對自己的目標有清楚的概念。

condemn.example_zh: 人們譴責這殘忍的行為。

conduct.example_zh: 科學家進行了一項實驗。

conduct.example: His conduct in class was excellent.
conduct.example_zh: 他在課堂上的表現很好。

confession.example_zh: 他的招供讓警方很驚訝。

confine.example: The sick boy was confined to his bed.

conform.example: Students must conform to the dress code.
conform.example_zh: 學生必須遵守服裝規定。

confront.example: She had to confront her fear.
confront.example_zh: 她必須面對自己的恐懼。

confrontation.example: They avoided a confrontation with their boss.
confrontation.example_zh: 他們避免與老闆正面衝突。

consecutive.example: It rained for five consecutive days.

consensus.example: The group reached a consensus quickly.

consent.example: You need your parents' consent to join.
consent.example_zh: 你需要父母的同意才能加入。

conservation.example: Water conservation is important in summer.

considerate.example: It was considerate of you to help.

constitutional.example: Free speech is a constitutional right.
constitutional.example_zh: 言論自由是憲法賦予的權利。

constraint.example: Time was the main constraint on the project.
constraint.example_zh: 時間是這個專案的主要限制。

consultation.example: She booked a consultation with the doctor.
consultation.example_zh: 她預約了一次醫生諮詢。

consumption.example: We should reduce our energy consumption.
consumption.example_zh: 我們應該減少能源消耗。

contagious.zh: 接觸傳染的、有感染力的

contaminate.example: Dirty water can contaminate the river.

contemplate.example: He contemplated his next move carefully.

contempt.example: He looked at the cheater with contempt.
contempt.example_zh: 他輕蔑地看著那個作弊的人。

contend.example: Two teams contend for the title.

continental.example: The hotel serves a continental breakfast.
continental.example_zh: 這家飯店提供歐陸式早餐。

contractor.example: The contractor built the new house.
contractor.example_zh: 承包商蓋了那棟新房子。

contradiction.example: There is a contradiction in his story.

controversy.example: The decision caused a lot of controversy.
controversy.example_zh: 這項決定引起了很大的爭議。

conversion.example: The conversion from miles to kilometers is easy.
conversion.example_zh: 英里換算成公里很簡單。

convert.example: They converted the garage into a room.
convert.example_zh: 他們把車庫改成了房間。

convict.example: The court convicted him of theft.

conviction.example: He has two convictions for stealing.
conviction.example_zh: 他有兩次竊盜的定罪紀錄。

copyright.example: The song is protected by copyright.

core.example: Honesty is at the core of his character.

corporate.example: She works in a large corporate office.
corporate.example_zh: 她在一間大企業的辦公室工作。

corporation.example_zh: 這家公司在世界各地都有辦事處。

correlation.example: There is a correlation between sleep and health.
correlation.example_zh: 睡眠與健康之間有關聯。

correspondent.example: The correspondent reported from the city.
correspondent.example_zh: 特派記者從那座城市做報導。

corridor.example: Her office is at the end of the corridor.
corridor.example_zh: 她的辦公室在走廊盡頭。

corruption.example: They fought against corruption in government.

counsel.example: The teacher gave us wise counsel.
counsel.example_zh: 老師給了我們明智的建議。
她為有困擾的人提供諮商。

counselor.example_zh: 學校輔導老師幫助學生。

courteous.example: The staff were friendly and courteous.

coverage.example: The news coverage of the event was wide.
coverage.example_zh: 這起事件的新聞報導很廣泛。
